rationale: The archetype's top-down stylus-driven sort puzzle has almost no mechanical overlap with Roof Rails' forward-running, pole-balancing rooftop slide loop — running this hook would be a hard bait-and-switch and likely tank IPM/D1 retention. Palette is also off (warm orange/purple vs. the game's bright cyan + yellow cityscape) and there's no character on-screen, which removes the "watch the runner fail/succeed" tension that drives Roof Rails CTR. Only the broad casual/relaxation audience overlaps; do not green-light unless reshooting with the runner POV and a "satisfying pole extension" hook instead.
